flags.title: Slicker Brush ad spend detected (LIQUIDATION violation)
flags.problem: B0FQ628KCH received $3.61 in 7d ad spend (Query C, Jul 9-14) violating the no-ad-funding rule for the liquidation SKU.
flags.solution: Pause all ad campaigns targeting B0FQ628KCH immediately.
flags.action: Ad Console → Campaigns → filter ASIN B0FQ628KCH → set all active campaigns to Paused.
flags.deadline_cost: $0.52/day forbidden spend; organic doodle brush rank collapsed ↓48 to rank 144

flags.title: Save the Shave Bundle (B0GT1H84JM) KILL band — $206.97/day at 0.00 ROAS
flags.problem: B0GT1H84JM spending $206.97/day (Jul 14) with ROAS 0.00 and 7d burn of $1,443.99 at zero return — KILL band.
flags.solution: Pause the Save the Shave Bundle campaign in Ad Console immediately.
flags.action: Ad Console → Campaigns → locate campaign(s) for ASIN B0GT1H84JM → Status: Paused.

flags.title: Emergency Dematter rank defense — HOLD on dog detangler (rank 17, ↓5)
flags.problem: Emergency Dematter dog detangler dropped 5 spots to rank 17 (H10 Jul 15) while ROAS is YELLOW (1.993 vs 2.07 breakeven).
flags.solution: Hold all Dematter bid ceilings — do not cut on dog detangler during this volatile slide.
flags.action: Ad Console → Dematter campaigns → confirm all keyword bids at current ceiling; make no adjustments.
flags.deadline_cost: Rank could slide further if underfunded; cutting bids on volatile keyword widens organic gap

flags.title: Detangling Treatment RED band — ROAS 1.666, TACOS 49.1%
flags.problem: Detangling Treatment ROAS 1.666 is in RED band (breakeven 2.74) with TACOS 49.1% and trickle-spend pattern confirmed (L-2026-07-08-002).
flags.solution: Lower Detangling Treatment keyword bids by 20-30% to pull ROAS above the RED floor.
flags.action: Ad Console → campaigns targeting B0GV5ZFLC2 → lower each keyword bid 20-30% from current values.
flags.deadline_cost: $22.80 in RED-band spend over next 2 days if unchanged

flags.title: Rake Brush KILL band — ROAS 0.00, LOW STOCK
flags.problem: Rake Brush ROAS 0.00 on $4.06 Jul 14 spend; organic TACOS 9.8% shows strong organic velocity; inventory at LOW STOCK (668 vs amazon_min 942).
flags.solution: Pause Rake Brush ad campaigns — organic is driving sales; ads add pure cost on low stock.
flags.action: Ad Console → campaigns targeting B0FQF2VTMJ → Status: Paused.
flags.deadline_cost: $5.08/day waste; pausing conserves stock for organic channel during low-inventory window

flags.title: Pin Brush TACOS extreme — 243.5% at barely-YELLOW ROAS
flags.problem: Pin Brush TACOS 243.5% proxy (7d $43.80 / 1d $17.99) with ROAS just barely YELLOW (2.115 vs yellow_min 2.09); trickle-spend pattern (L-2026-07-08-002).
flags.solution: Pause Pin Brush campaigns as consolidated low-spend-SKU decision alongside Rake Brush.
flags.action: Ad Console → campaigns targeting B0FQDHXSZ5 → Status: Paused. Decide in same session as Rake Brush.

flags.title: 4-in-1 Shampoo KILL band + EXCESS inventory
flags.problem: 4-in-1 Shampoo ROAS 0.00 on $1.10 Jul 14 spend in KILL band; EXCESS 4,055 units (3,522 est. excess); LTSF ≥181d.
flags.solution: Pause all 4-in-1 Shampoo campaigns — KILL band plus excess inventory means zero case for ad spend.
flags.action: Ad Console → campaigns targeting B0FQL16GH4 → Status: Paused.
flags.deadline_cost: $1.65/day waste; excess units accruing LTSF risk independently

flags.title: FurFix De-Shed Brush (B0FQFP2S9F) STRANDED — BLOCKED 72h+
flags.problem: B0FQFP2S9F STRANDED (0 FBA units, H10 LIF 0 CRITICAL, LTSF ≥181d); first flagged Jul 13 11:25 AM — 72h+ elapsed, BLOCKED threshold exceeded.
flags.solution: Fix or close B0FQFP2S9F listing in Seller Central immediately; confirm whether intentional launch.
flags.action: Seller Central → Manage Inventory → Fix Stranded Inventory → locate B0FQFP2S9F → follow fix wizard. If active launch: add to H10 and roas_bands.json same day.
flags.deadline_cost: Listing suppressed from organic; LTSF fees accruing; -$23.95 net recorded with zero revenue (Jul 6-12)

flags.title: 4-in-1 Shampoo EXCESS — 3,522 est. excess units, LTSF risk
flags.problem: 4,055 FBA units with amazon_min 66 and lowest organic velocity ($17.99 1d proxy); ads paused; LTSF ≥181d flag.
flags.solution: Add a 10-15% promotional coupon to accelerate Shampoo sell-through and reduce LTSF exposure.
flags.action: Seller Central → Advertising → Coupons → Create coupon for B0FQL16GH4 → 10-15% off → run 30 days.
flags.deadline_cost: LTSF fees accruing on aging excess; 53+ weeks to clear at current velocity

flags.title: Pin Brush EXCESS — 1,870 est. excess units, keyword coverage gap possible
flags.problem: 2,062 FBA units with amazon_min 127 and insufficient velocity ($17.99 1d proxy); ads paused; H10 keyword coverage gap (3-of-6 tracker).
flags.solution: Check Pin Brush backend keyword coverage in Seller Central to identify organic traffic gap.
flags.action: Seller Central → Business Reports → Detail Page Sales and Traffic by ASIN → B0FQDHXSZ5 → review top search terms; route to Anchor for backend keyword refresh if thin.
flags.deadline_cost: Excess accruing LTSF risk with ads off; 49+ weeks to clear at current velocity

flags.title: Rake Brush LOW STOCK — below amazon_min, 1,650 inbound ETA unknown
flags.problem: 668 FBA units vs. amazon_min 942 (below threshold) with 1,650 inbound; highest-velocity non-Dematter SKU (TACOS 9.8%, $362.71 1d proxy).
flags.solution: Confirm inbound 1,650-unit shipment ETA — if >14 days out, assess bridge reorder immediately.
flags.action: Seller Central → Manage Inventory → Shipments → find Rake Brush inbound → confirm expected delivery date. If >14 days: fast-track reorder.
flags.deadline_cost: Stock-out risk on highest-velocity non-Dematter SKU; rank loss more costly than bridge order
